daily_scripture.verse: The Lord will guide you always; he will satisfy your needs in a sun-scorched land and will strengthen your frame.

career.quarterly: Launch Benji MVP with initial customers. Apply to YC S26 (May 4 deadline) and 3+ other accelerators.
career.monthly: Complete core ML pipeline. Analyze 50+ videos. Label 200+ clips. Landing page live. 10+ coach outreach emails. 5 coach calls scheduled.
career.weekly: Set up ML dev environment. Begin pose detection pipeline. Weekly tech scan. Start coach outreach list.
career.daily: Benji deep work at Ehub (10-12). Benji evening session (8-9:30). Leverage brainstorm with Arryan and coffee chat with Natalia.

faith.quarterly: Complete Isaiah with deep understanding. Build consistent 1-hour daily devotional habit.
faith.monthly: Read Isaiah daily (1 chapter/day). Build devotional streak - no zero days. Journal 3+ reflections per week.
faith.weekly: Read Isaiah 2-8. Journal 3+ reflections. No zero days.
faith.daily: Read Isaiah 3. No zero days - keep the streak alive.

fitness.quarterly: Gym 6x/week consistently (PPL x2). Balanced diet on a budget. Play sports 2x/week.
fitness.monthly: Hit gym 24+ times. Establish PPL routine. Track meals. Play tennis or basketball 2x/week.
fitness.weekly: Gym 6 sessions Mon-Wed, Fri-Sun. PPL split locked. Track meals daily.
fitness.daily: No gym today. Wake up early tomorrow and get back on track.

schedule.activity: Benji deep work at Ehub - ML pipeline + tech scan
Benji deep work - ML pipeline continued

tasks.name: Benji deep work - ML pipeline setup at Ehub (10-12)
Set alarm for early wake-up tomorrow

milestones.kpis: 10 videos analyzed, 5 coach names, dev env running

affirmations: I am building something that will change how coaches develop athletes. God has placed this vision in me for a reason.
I am disciplined, focused, and relentless. I do not waste time - every hour moves me closer to my goal.
I am not behind. I am exactly where God needs me to be, and I will steward this season with excellence.
I ship fast, talk to users, and iterate. Perfection is the enemy - progress is the standard.
My body is my instrument. I train it, fuel it, and rest it so I can perform at my best.
I am a founder. I solve problems, build products, and create value. This is who I am becoming.
I trust God's timing. I work as if it depends on me and pray as if it depends on Him.
Today I will do one thing that scares me - one conversation, one cold email, one bold ask.
I am grateful for Berkeley, for this opportunity, for my family, and for the strength to pursue this dream.
36 days. No time to be perfect. Time to be real. Let's go.

daily_log.summary: Setup day. Command Center initialized. Dashboard deployed to Vercel.
Productive day. Followed schedule. Presented in Decal. Dinner meeting done. Gym skipped.
daily_log.notes: Good execution overall. Schedule followed except gym. Dinner meeting productive. Slept past alarm - reset tomorrow.
